title: Firewall management access must be restricted
reason: New high severity control; triage ownership, implementation, and evidence first.
check_summary: Review firewall management network restrictions and approved admin source ranges.
fix_summary: Restrict firewall management access to approved networks.
evidence_needed: Screenshot or export of the relevant setting; Network device configuration excerpt or management console export; Date/time of validation; System or asset name; Reviewer notes

title: Windows audit policy must be configured and reviewed
reason: Severity increased to high and fix guidance changed; prioritize analyst and implementation owner review.
tags: Audit Logging; Endpoint Security; Windows; GPO

evidence_needed: Screenshot or export of the relevant setting; GPO, registry, or Local Security Policy export; Date/time of validation; System or asset name; Reviewer notes

title: Linux SSH banner must be configured
reason: Check guidance changed meaningfully; validation evidence may need updates.
check_summary: Run sshd -T and review the banner setting and file permissions.
fix_summary: Configure the sshd Banner directive in /etc/ssh/sshd_config.
evidence_needed: Screenshot or export of the relevant setting; Command output showing the configured value; Relevant policy or configuration file excerpt; Date/time of validation; System or asset name; Reviewer notes
